The dropship subcontractor on order workflow consists of up to six steps: #. Create a sales order...
Create a sales order (SO)... doing so creates a subcontractor PO to purchase the product from the subcontractor.
Confirm the PO... doing so creates a request for quotation (RfQ)...
Confirm the PO... doing so creates... a receipt order...
Confirm the PO... doing so creates... a dropship order.
Confirm the PO... doing so creates a Dropship Subcontractor order.
Process the Dropship Subcontractor order once the vendor has sent the components...
Process the receipt once the subcontractor has finished manufacturing...
process the dropship order to ship the product directly to the end customer.
...ship the product directly to the end customer.
If... and the finished product is not dropshipped... process the delivery order once the product has been shipped to the customer.
